"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Starstruck.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Starstruck.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Starstruck.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O3 -DNDEBUG  -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Starstruck.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Starstruck.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStarstruck.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Starstruck.dir\linkLibs.rsp
